wordplay_note: A pool of data that thinks it is a person
card_description: Garson Poole (meaning "Poole = pool / reservoir") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Electric Ant*. Robot businessman who discovers he is an electric ant (android) and can edit his own reality tape. Name note: A pool of data that thinks it is a person. Self-modification of perception — pulling the reality tape to change experience. First appears in *The Electric Ant*.

reference.brief: Robot businessman who discovers he is an electric ant (android) and can edit his own reality tape
reference.significance: Self-modification of perception — pulling the reality tape to change experience
